page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A tool for mapping and performing quality control on Hi-C data
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A mapping pipeline for hic interaction data. performs independent mapping on each end of the interaction pair and removes commonly found artefacts.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A mapping pipeline for HiC interaction data. Performs independent mapping on each end of the interaction pair and removes commonly found artefacts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A mapping pipeline for HiC interaction data. Performs independent mapping on each end of the interaction pair and removes commonly found artefacts.
